description_long: An adult pedestrian is depicted wearing a long, belted trench coat that extends to the knees, paired with fitted trousers and sturdy, lace-up boots. The individual is holding a long-handled shovel in one hand, with the blade resting on the ground. The coat features a prominent collar and appears to be made of a heavy, weather-resistant fabric, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The person's posture is upright and relaxed, with one arm extended downward to grip the shovel. The boots are robust and practical, designed for walking or working outdoors. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, possibly work-related outfit, with no visible accessories apart from the shovel.
description: An adult in a long trench coat and boots stands upright, holding a shovel with one hand. The attire is utilitarian and suited for outdoor or work-related activities.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full trench coat, boots, and the person holding the shovel with the blade visible to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the coat, the extended arm holding the shovel, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the coat, both boots, and the shovel handle extending to the right.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the arm holding the shovel, the side of the coat, and the shovel blade facing outward.
attribute_clothing_type: long belted trench coat, fitted trousers, and practical outdoor boots
